content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves sharply to the left with the white gravel boundary visible on the right, and the car is on the right side of the track navigating a tight left-hand bend.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 102, target index = (102+5) % 121 = 107
- WP107: x=1.094280, y=1.665545
- Car: x=0.934397, y=1.535551, heading=-101.070°
- dy = 1.665545 - 1.535551 = +0.129994
- dx = 1.094280 - 0.934397 = +0.159883
- bearing = atan2(0.129994, 0.159883): both positive → Q1
  - angle = atan(0.129994/0.159883) = atan(0.8131) ≈ 39.1° → bearing ≈ +39.1°
- delta = 39.1° - (-101.070°) = +140.17°
- Normalize: 140.17° < 180, so delta = +140.17° → steer LEFT

**Boundary check:**
- is_left_of_center = false (right of center)
- edge_distance = (0.762/2) - 0.183 = 0.381 - 0.183 = 0.198m → just below 0.20m threshold
- delta = +140.17° → steer left (away from right edge) → safe to steer left

|delta| > 50°: speed=0.75, steering_angle=+25.0

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves sharply left ahead, car is right of center with delta≈+140° requiring maximum left steering to follow the curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length.",
    "WP0-20: long straight along y≈0.683 heading east.",
    "WP24-44: left curve from east to west, requires sustained positive steering.",
    "WP44-55: straight westward along y≈2.77.",
    "WP82-96: sharp south/southeast curve — large positive delta, need max left steering.",
    "WP97-110: heading ~-101°, curving south; delta near +140-163° means sharp left turn continues — use max steering_angle=+25 at speed=0.75.",
    "Car consistently slightly right of center (distance_from_center ~0.18m) in WP100-107 region.",
    "When |delta|>50°, use steering_angle=+25 at speed=0.75.",
    "When |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation.",
    "Progress ~86.1% at step 178 — on track and making good progress through sharp left curve."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [0.980, 0.948, 0.934, 0.931, 0.934],
    "y": [1.834, 1.731, 1.651, 1.592, 1.536],
    "heading": [-107.882, -107.727, -106.065, -103.907, -101.070]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP107 at (1.094, 1.666): bearing≈+39.1°, delta≈+140.2° → maximum left correction needed.",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": 25.0
}
```
